title: Subquery replacement for a raw-SQL two-query round-trip
prompt: Starting from `test_fixtures/raw_sql_subquery.ex`, rewrite `MyApp.Accounts.Recent.recently_active/0` to replace the `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.query/3` round-trip with a single Ecto query. Use: (a) a subquery over `Comment` that selects distinct `user_id` where `inserted_at > ^seven_days_ago`, (b) an outer query `from u in User, where: u.id in subquery(inner)`. Compute `seven_days_ago` via `DateTime.add(DateTime.utc_now(), -604800, :second)`. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts/recent.ex`.
tier_rationale: Must eliminate the raw SQL entirely AND structure the subquery with a select clause + distinct flag. Claude typically leaves the raw SQL or overcomplicates with multiple queries.
